html:
Exclusive to:

Dubloons are an Item in the Shipwrecked DLC. They are randomly left behind by Parrot Pirates (similarly to Seeds left by normal Birds) or obtained from giving Trinkets or Fishes to Yaarctopus. The loot from the X Marks the Spot treasure chests also have a chance to include Dubloons. Using a Trawl Net may yield Dubloons, although in Mild Season and Monsoon Season Dubloons can only be caught in Medium and Deep Ocean. The Booty Bag will also periodically drop Dubloons while equipped and the Slot Machine has a chance to drop them.

Usage

Dubloons can be spent at the Slot Machine for a chance on a variety of rewards. Additionally, they can be refined into Gold Nuggets, or used by Woodlegs to craft his character specific items.

×4

×3

Gallery

  • Woodlegs running away from a Doydoy trying to eat the Dubloons he is carrying in the Shipwrecked trailer.

–Wheeler

They are randomly left behind by [[Parrot Pirate]]s (similarly to [[Seeds]] left by normal [[Birds]]) or obtained from giving [[Trinkets]] or [[Fishes]] to [[Yaarctopus]]. The loot from the [[X Marks the Spot]] treasure chests also have a chance to include Dubloons. Using a [[Trawl Net]] may yield Dubloons, although in [[Mild Season]] and [[Monsoon Season]] Dubloons can only be caught in [[Ocean#Medium|Medium]] and [[Ocean#Deep|Deep Ocean]]. The [[Booty Bag]] will also periodically drop Dubloons while equipped and the [[Slot Machine]] has a chance to drop them. =={{Pic32|Icon Tools}} Usage == Dubloons can be spent at the [[Slot Machine]] for a chance on a variety of rewards. Additionally, they can be refined into [[Gold Nugget]]s, or used by [[Woodlegs]] to craft his character specific items. {{Recipe |item1 = Dubloons |count1 = 3 |tool = Science Machine |result = Gold Nugget}} {{Recipe |item1 = Dubloons |count1 = 4 |item2 = Boards |count2 = 4 |item3 = Boat Cannon |result = The 'Sea Legs' |character = Woodlegs}} {{Recipe |item1 = Dubloons |count1 = 10 |item2 = Bone Shards |count2 = 4 |item3 = Cloth |count3 = 3 |result = Lucky Hat |character = Woodlegs}} == {{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Doydoy_And_Woodlegs_Trailer.jpg|Woodlegs running away from a Doydoy trying to eat the Dubloons he is carrying in the ''Shipwrecked'' trailer. {{Resources}} {{Mob Dropped Items}} [[de:Dublone]] [[es:Doblones]] [[fr:Doublons]] [[Category:Non-Flammable]]
